name: /compliance-add: after appending, triggers C-14 sync so the corresponding generated-code-quality-standards/<jurisdiction>/<id>/ folder is scaffolded
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro generated-code-quality-standards && printf '' > .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && printf 'Authoritative.
Widely adopted.
Government publisher.
' > why.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-add.sh" https://www.nist.gov --id nist-ai-rmf --catalog "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml" --why-authoritative-file "$PWD/why.txt" --target "$PWD/generated-code-quality-standards" && test -d generated-code-quality-standards/us-government/nist-ai-rmf && echo ok 1>&2
